title: Jofi's 3D Apples
body:
![render of the apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/011cf15731f1484aba2f68f20bb1ddfdb27b19ad_0.webp)

### What does this bring to the game
- **New models** - All apples now have updated 3D models
- **Particles** - New and improved eating particles
- **Holding position** - You now hold the apples in a more realistic way


<details>
<summary>Usage</summary>
If you’d like to use this project in a modpack, adventure map, or server, please make sure to credit it by linking to the original source on Modrinth. <3


</details>
